elements.title: Li Zhenxiu
elements.contents: ... that Li Zhenxiu (pictured) was sworn into Taiwan's Legislative Yuan while still holding Chinese citizenship?

elements.title: Chimacum Creek
elements.contents: ... that a high-school fish-hatchery program was disrupted when more than 100,000 US gallons (380,000 L; 83,000 imp gal) of chlorinated water leaked into Chimacum Creek?

elements.title: Rat Watson
elements.contents: ... that Rat Watson, a 141-pound (64 kg) quarterback, led "the greatest football team ever assembled in Texas", outscoring opponents 432 to 6?

elements.title: The Dream of Belinda
elements.contents: ... that The Dream of Belinda combines imagery from The Rape of the Lock with the Queen Mab of Romeo and Juliet?

elements.title: his stepfather
elements.contents: ... that, according to legend, the poet Charles Baudelaire tried to organize a mob to kill his stepfather during the French Revolution of 1848?

elements.title: A Media Luz
elements.contents: ... that "A Media Luz" ("With Dimmed Lights") is one of the most successful tango compositions of all time?

elements.title: Princess Thonbanhla
elements.contents: ... that Princess Thonbanhla is honored annually on the eve of the full moon with a ceremony funded by local villagers?

elements.title: a 2021 constitutional amendment
elements.contents: ... that more than a quarter of Pennsylvania voters opposed a 2021 constitutional amendment to prohibit racial and ethnic discrimination?

elements.title: Bernard Chen
elements.contents: ... that Bernard Chen, the general manager of Fraser and Neave's soft‑drinks division, was allergic to alcohol?
